meta_title: For Freelancers: SEO for SaaS to Solve stuck with basic apps (Intermediate Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to SEO for SaaS and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Intermediate-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: SEO for SaaS to Solve Stuck-in-Basic-Apps
content.seo_description: Learn how to SEO for SaaS and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Intermediate-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code for professional output.
content.answer_block: Stop building static sites and start architecting search-engine-optimized SaaS platforms. By integrating dynamic metadata injection, structured JSON-LD data, and server-side rendering, you transform basic apps into high-ranking assets. Use Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code to automate your technical SEO audit, ensuring your client projects scale effortlessly.
content.intro:
You know the feeling: you’ve shipped a dozen ‘functional’ apps, but they sit in the digital wilderness, invisible to search engines and failing to move the needle for your clients. You are stuck in a loop of building features that no one ever finds, while your portfolio remains trapped in the low-value tier of 'generic development.'

It is time to pivot from being a coder to an architect. By embedding professional-grade SEO directly into your SaaS stack, you shift from delivering code to delivering organic growth. We are going to bypass the manual drudgery using Antigravity and Claude Code, turning your next client project into a high-authority machine that ranks while you sleep.

steps.title: Dynamic Metadata Injection
steps.description: Stop hardcoding meta tags. We will build a dynamic service that pulls content from your database to populate headers, ensuring every dynamic route is indexed correctly by search crawlers.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a reusable Next.js metadata service that fetches page-specific SEO data from a database and injects it into the layout metadata object dynamically.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /add ./src/services/seo.ts --apply 'Update all dynamic routes to utilize this new metadata service.'

steps.title: Structured Data (JSON-LD) Implementation
steps.description: Google loves schema. We will implement JSON-LD to give search engines a map of your SaaS, highlighting its core features and pricing tiers to win rich snippets.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a JSON-LD schema component for a SaaS product that supports FAQ, Pricing, and Product types, allowing for easy integration into existing React pages.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /run 'Scan the landing page and inject the JSON-LD component with accurate pricing data.'

steps.title: Sitemap and Robots.txt Automation
steps.description: Manual sitemaps are a death sentence for scaling. We will automate sitemap generation so that every new client feature is indexed instantly.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build an API route in Next.js that generates a sitemap.xml dynamically based on the current database entries and existing static routes.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /add ./app/sitemap.ts --apply 'Ensure the sitemap excludes authentication-locked routes.'

steps.title: Semantic HTML Refactoring
steps.description: SEO starts with clean code. We will refactor your existing UI components to use semantic HTML5 tags, improving accessibility and crawler interpretation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit my main landing page components and suggest refactors to improve semantic structure, replacing generic divs with main, section, and article tags.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /analyze ./components/layout/ --apply 'Refactor all divs to semantic HTML tags without breaking styles.'

steps.title: Performance-Based SEO Audit
steps.description: Page speed is a ranking factor. We will use Claude Code to run a lighthouse-style audit and automatically apply performance optimizations.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a script to audit current bundle sizes and suggest code-splitting strategies to reduce Time to First Byte (TTFB).
steps.claude_code_command: claude /run 'Optimize image imports and implement lazy loading across all heavy components.'

pro_tips: Always use Canonical URLs for multi-tenant SaaS dashboards to prevent duplicate content penalties.
Prioritize Core Web Vitals (LCP/CLS) over keyword stuffing; Google's modern algorithm favors user experience.
Use server-side redirects for deprecated features to preserve link equity for your clients.
Implement an 'OG Image' generator that creates dynamic social preview cards for every user-generated post.
Monitor your 'Crawl Budget' by blocking search engines from indexing low-value internal admin routes in robots.txt.
content.next_steps: Deploy your optimized SaaS to Vercel or your preferred provider, run a Google Search Console crawl, and monitor the Indexing report for the next 48 hours to confirm your changes are live.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical blueprint to stop building 'basic' apps and start shipping high-authority SaaS platforms that clients pay a premium for. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
